prompt: Ultra-realistic 8K full-body portrait of the same man from the reference photo, wearing a clean, pressed orange dress shirt with a turned-up collar and a small lapel microphone, dark navy blue trousers, and polished brown dress shoes. He is casually and unpretentiously leaning against a smooth, light gray studio wall; his hands are in his pockets and one leg is crossed over the other, with relaxed and confident body language.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic 8K full-body portrait of the same man from the reference photo, wearing a clean, pressed orange dress shirt with a turned-up collar and a small lapel microphone, dark navy blue trousers, and polished brown dress shoes. He is casually and unpretentiously leaning against a smooth, light gray studio wall; his hands are in his pockets and one leg is crossed over the other, with relaxed and confident body language.
promptZh: 参考照片中同一位男士的超写实 8K 全身肖像，身穿 干净挺括的橙色 礼服衬衫，领口翻起并佩戴小型领夹麦克风，搭配 深海军蓝 长裤和 抛光棕色 正装皮鞋。他随意且自然地倚靠在平滑的 浅灰色 影棚墙壁上；双手插兜，双腿交叠，展现出放松而自信的肢体语言。
